economic_notes: Band has two Government Business Entities: Bridge River Development Corporation (100% owned) and Bridge River Management LP (99.99% owned), accounted for using modified equity method. BC Hydro revenue of $1,700,744 suggests resource/energy agreements. New Relationship Trust funding of $505,000 received in 2024.
notes: Two GBEs (Bridge River Development Corp and Bridge River Management LP) are accounted for using modified equity method and not fully consolidated. Resources segment includes significant BC Hydro revenue ($1,236,682) suggesting power generation or resource agreements. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $362,107 + deposits $3,002 + interest payable $1,399 + wages payable $86,914 = $453,422 (excluding long-term debt current portion). Total government transfers include ISC $3,547,589 + CMHC $46,679 + Additional Government Funding $607,467 + DFO $545331 + FNHA $1,045,606 = $5,792,672; if New Relationship Trust $505,000 is also government transfer then $6,297,672. OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
